events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a random/uncontrolled cracking defect (FD) caused by sawcutting control joints later than the ACI 302.1R-recommended window, so shrinkage cracked the slab before the joints could direct it. Marked as `fail` with medium risk, requiring crack mapping, possible epoxy injection/rout-and-seal repair, and corrected sawcut timing on remaining pours.
